name: samplingPlan
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.method === 'string'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.rationale === 'string'
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data. AuditActionPanel.actSample sends FLAT PERCENTS {populationSize, confidenceLevel:95, tolerableErrorRate:5, expectedErrorRate:1}; the original parity path sends {population:{total}} + params.confidenceLevel(0.95 fraction). Handler accepts BOTH: flat component keys (confidenceLevel/tolerableErrorRate/expectedErrorRate) are percents (/100), params keys (marginOfError/expectedDefectRate) are fractions. Finite-population attribute sample size n = (Z^2 p q / E^2) / (1 + (n_inf-1)/N). Result card renders sampleSize / populationSize / confidenceLevel(as a PERCENT for the '{confidenceLevel}% confidence' line) / expectedErrorRate / method / rationale EXACTLY (the prior requiredSampleSize + nested parameters{} fields were NOT what the card read → the sample card was blank and the flat percents reached fraction-reading params; fixed 2026-06-28; requiredSampleSize + parameters{} retained for parity + provenance). Fail-CLOSED numerics: Number()+Number.isFinite, so 'Infinity' populationSize is rejected (-> non-positive -> empty message, never an Infinity sample) and '12abc' confidence falls to the 95% default, never silently accepted as 12.
